HGSS.320.0000:
Oh my!
I remember there was nothing built here\r
when I climbed the mountain.\f
Things change, and it’s getting more
and more convenient.
HGSS.320.0001:
Many Trainers are visiting the mountain.
You never know what wild Pokémon you’ll\r
encounter. It is very important to\r
recover your Pokémon at a place like\r
this. Don’t forget to make a record\r
of your progress, either!
